# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2015-01-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
	  "defaultValue": "<SQL_Server_Name>",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SQL server name."
      }
    },
	"appUrl": {
      "type": "string",
	  "defaultValue": "<App_Service_URL>",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The app service url. Leave this field empty if you don't intend to use Azure web apps. It is only used when deploying a web app."
	  }
    },
    "sqlDbName": {
      "type": "string",
	  "defaultValue": "<SQL_Database Name>",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SQL database name."
	  }
    },
	"storageAccountName": {
	  "type": "string",
	  "defaultValue": "<Storage Account Name>",
	  "metadata": {
	    "description": "The storage account name. Leave this field empty if you don't intend to use Azure blob storage or Azure file storage for blob storage. It is only used when deploying a web app."
	  }
	},
	"sqlUsername": {
      "type": "string",
	  "defaultValue": "<SQL_User Name>",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SQL user name. Leave this field empty if you don't intend to use Azure SQL Database for your SQL server. It is only used when deploying a web app."
	  }
    },
	"sqlPassword": {
	  "type": "securestring",
	  "defaultValue": "<SQL_User Password>",
	  "metadata": {
	    "description": "The SQL user password. Leave this field empty if you don't intend to use Azure SQL Database for your SQL server. It is only used when deploying a web app."
	  }
	},
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "apiVersion": "2015-08-01", 
      "name": "[variables('sqlServerName')]", 
	  "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
	  "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "tags": {},
      "sku": {
        "tier": "<Standard>"
      },
      "properties": {}
    },{
	  "apiVersion": "2015-08-01",
      "name": "[variables('sqlServerName')]", 
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
	  "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "tags": {},
	  "sku": {
        "name":"GP_Gen5"
      },
      "properties": {}
	},{
      "apiVersion": "2017-04-30", 
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites", 
	  "name": "[parameters('appUrl')]",
	  "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "tags": {},
      "kind":"app,linux",  
      "properties": {
	    "serverFarmId": "/subscriptions/[subscription()].[subscriptionId]/resourceGroups/[resourceGroup().name]/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverFarms/default",
        "siteConfig":{
          "appSettings":[
            {
              "name":"SQLCONNSTR",
              "value":"Server=[sqlServerName].[database].[windows.net];Initial Catalog=SampleDatabase;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=test;Password=<PASSWORD>"
            },
			{
			  "name":"WEBSITE_DATABASE_CONNECTION_STRING",
			  "value":"Server=[sqlServerName].[database].[windows.net];Initial Catalog=SampleDatabase;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=test;Password=<PASSWORD>"
			},
			{
			  "name":  "Microsoft.Azure.WebSites.ConnectionString",
			  "value": "{ \"SQLSERVERCONNSTR_0\":\"Server=[sqlServerName].[database].[windows.net];Initial Catalog=SampleDatabase;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=test;Password=<PASSWORD>\"}"
			}
          ],
		  "metadata": [
		    {
			  "name":"APPSETTING_SQLUSERNAME",
			  "value":"[parameters('sqlUsername')]"
			},
			{
			  "name":  "Microsoft.Azure.WebSites.Meta.ConnectionString",
			  "value": "{ \"SqlAzure\":\"Server=[sqlServerName].[database].[windows.net];Initial Catalog=SampleDatabase;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=test;Password=<PASSWORD>\"}"
			}
          ]
        },
	    "siteAuthEncryptionEnabled":"false"
      }
	},
	{
	  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2015-08-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
      "apiVersion": "2016-03-30", 
      "name": "[variables('sqlServerName')]", 
	  "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/[parameters('sqlServerName')]/firewallRules",
	  "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",	
	  "tags": {},
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress":"0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress":"0.0.0.255"
      }
	},
    {
